titleStmt.title: SII 4.1080: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1080. (A.R. No. 234 of 1893). ON THE SAME WALL, BETWEEN THE FOURTH AND THE FIFTH PILLARS.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīma hākṣa ryyavaṁśatilakōsya Āsīnnāmnā dayitā kulajā śrītoṁḍidēvīti [. 1*]
tābhyāṁ śivābhyāmiva kārttikēyaḥ śrutiśrutābhyāmivadharmma Iddhaḥ . rājēṁdracōḍakṣitipānujanmā jā
tassutassatyamahēśanāmā Ø2 satyatyāgadayānidhiḥ pratinidhi(ḥ)rddhēnōssurāṇāṁ tarōrapyurvvīśaśikhāmaṇissa
marajidyaḥ kōnadēśādhipaḥ . śrīmānsatyamahīpatiḥ pratidinaprāptōdayaḥ paṇḍitai rnnityastutyasahasrabā
huguṇasaṁpannaḥ pratāpōnnataḥ Ø [. 3*] muniśaraviyadiṁdūdbhāvyamānē śakābdē prathitavati jananyāḥ śrēya
sē toṁṇḍidēvyāḥ . sa guṇakhanirakhaṇḍaṁ bhīmanādhāyadīpaṁ smadiśati kṛtakṛtya(ḥ)ssatyavāksatyabhū
paḥ [. 4*] svasti samastaśakavarṣaṁbulu 1057 gunēṇḍu śrīmaccālukyavikramasaṁvatsara 60 gu śrāhi śrībhī
mēśvaramahādēvaraku kōnarājapaṟeni koḍku sattirāju tamatalli toṇḍidēviki darmmārtthamugā nuttarāya
ṇasaṁkrāṁtti nimittamunaṁ beṭṭina yakhaṇḍavarttilōhadaṇḍu diviya 1ki nācaṁdrārkkamuneyi sariyiṁccuvāru
gā bōlu nalvuruṁ būṁṭagāṁ dalarāsi prōliyabōyuniki sarvvasiddhiyaṁddu tūrppunna polamunaṁddu
sarvvakaraparihāramugāṁ beṭṭina bhūmi khaṇḍuvulāṟu lekni kha 60 ṭiki nācāṁdrārkkamu pōyaṁgala nityapaḍi tri
bhuvanāṁkkuśa nēti māna 1 likhitaṁ peddanācāryyēṇa dīnika yilupaṭṭu 3 .
Digital edition of SII 4.1080 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
